steps.description: The student turns off the circuit breaker box.
The student opens the door of the front panel.
The student inspects for visible damage.
The student puts the circuit breaker on the quality control table.
The student plugs a new component into a socket.
The student closes the panel door.
The student turns on the main power.
The student presses the reset button on the left side of the second break box.
The student presses the button again to turn it off.
The student turns off the main power.
The student disconnects the replacement and puts it in the toolbox, then grabs the other breaker and reconnects it.
The student turns the circuit breaker back on.
